hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; IN=$(cat); echo "$IN" | grep -qE '"stop_hook_active": *true' && exit 0; OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .tsbuildinfo 2>&1); [ -z "$OUT" ] && exit 0; { echo 'TypeScript 型別錯誤（Stop hook）— 請修正後再結束:'; echo "$OUT" | tail -30; } >&2; exit 2
INPUT="${TOOL_INPUT:-$(cat)}"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path": ?"[^"]*/\.env"'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env 含 secrets（OPENAI_API_KEY 等），請改 .env.example，或在 chat-room 說明需求' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .tsbuildinfo 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
